SOAP-ENV:Fault.faultstring: ShapeTool Error: Provided data does not match the required format.

detail.spring-ws:ValidationError: cvc-minInclusive-valid: Value '-10.0' is not facet-valid with respect to minInclusive '0.0E1' for type 'NonNegativeDouble'.
cvc-type.3.1.3: The value '-10.0' of element 'shape:radius' is not valid.
